programme.title: Mud

programme.title: The Long Walk Home
programme.desc: Odessa Carter (Whoopi Goldberg) needs to get to work as a nanny in the home of the affluent Miriam Thompson (Sissy Spacek), but she refuses to take the bus. Odessa is participating in the Montgomery bus boycott, protesting against the inequality between blacks and whites, so Miriam decides to offer Odessa a ride to work every day. Though the community and Miriam's husband (Dwight Schultz) insist she not get involved, the relationship between Miriam and Odessa has already changed for the better.

programme.title: Irresistible
programme.desc: When objects start to go missing from her home, Sophie Hartley (Susan Sarandon) suspects that a stalker is responsible. Then she meets Mara (Emily Blunt), the new co-worker of her husband, Craig (Sam Neill), and after seeing her in a dress that was among the vanished items, Sophie believes that Mara is obsessed with her. Unfortunately, she takes her suspicions too far, which leads to legal ramifications and her husband becoming concerned for her well-being -- but also to a startling discovery.

programme.title: Gang of Roses
programme.desc: A gang of gold-hunting outlaws, headed by the ruthless Left Eye Watkins (Bobby Brown), takes over the peaceful town of Flatridge, tearing the sleepy outpost to shreds as they search for riches. They murder a can-can girl, who is the sister of Rachel (Monica Calhoun), the onetime leader of a notorious all-girl gang. Rachel then rounds up her four old associates, and they seek revenge for her sister. Using teamwork and a sassy attitude, Rachel's gang goes up against Watkins' tough crew.

programme.title: Edison
programme.desc: Ambitious young reporter Pollack (Justin Timberlake) suspects insidious corruption in his town's elite police unit, known as F.R.A.T., and finds a friendly source in Deed (LL Cool J), a dissatisfied member of the squad. With Deed's information and the backing of his publisher, Ashford (Morgan Freeman), and a crusading lawyer, Wallace (Kevin Spacey), Pollack infiltrates the secretive police cabal. He finds himself in over his head, however, when he discovers the true extent of the criminality.

programme.title: A Walk To Remember
programme.desc: Two North Carolina teens, Landon Carter and Jamie Sullivan, are thrown together after Landon gets into trouble

programme.title: Sophie's Choice
programme.desc: A Holocaust survivor's tragic past.

programme.title: Elegy
programme.desc: A professor falls for a younger woman.

programme.title: The 6th Day
programme.desc: Family man Adam Gibson comes home from work one day to find a clone has replaced him. Taken from his family and plunged into a sinister world he doesn t understand, Gibson must not only save himself from the assassins who must destroy him to protect their secret, but uncover who and what is behind the horrible things happening to him.

programme.title: Basic

Aided by an 11-year-old neighbor girl, Dial must find a way to stay one step ahead of his hunter.

programme.title: Twisted Sister

programme.title: Get Out Alive
programme.desc: An estranged couple on a retreat have to put aside their problems to survive their targetting by criminals.

programme.title: Hunt for Truth
programme.desc: Carrie Evans uncovers unsettling truths about her family and boss Caswell Foxx while researching a major case.

programme.title: Pursued

programme.title: Love's Secret Ingredient
programme.desc: The owner of a struggling market teams up with a celebrity chef to revive each other’s reputations.

programme.title: The Challenger
programme.desc: The Challenger follows the life struggles of a young, Bronx auto mechanic, Jaden Miller. When Jaden and his mother are evicted from their home, he soon finds that boxing may be the key to stop them from living on the streets and the ticket to a better life. With legendary trainer, Duane Taylor, Miller becomes a local hero and captures the attention of a cable network that decides to create a reality show around his goal to fight to the Light-Heavyweight Title.

programme.title: I'm In Love With A Church Girl
programme.desc: A reformed drug trafficker finds unexpected love with a woman guided by strong faith, testing his resolve to leave his criminal past behind.

programme.title: Blessed & Cursed
programme.desc: Pain, Deceit and Triumph are just some of the plots twists that viewers will experience in this highly anticipated movie! A modern retelling of the dramatic Biblical account of Saul and David, Blessed & Cursed stars Gospel sensation Deitrick Haddon in his first theatrical debut as Dwight Hawkins an incredibly gifted young man who is in search of his purpose amid setbacks and unexpected surprises!

programme.title: Take Back
programme.desc: Zara (Gillian White) and Brian (Michael Jai White) are living the perfect small town life when a mysterious stranger from Zara's secret past kidnaps their daughter and now they must race to save her life.

programme.title: The Moon is in Aquarius
programme.desc: On a starry night lit by an Aquarius full moon, Devante and Liz collide at a house party in San Francisco. The spark is instant-and impossible to ignore. Ditching the crowd, they embark on a spontaneous journey through the city's winding streets, iconic views, and hidden gems. With every laugh and shared secret, their bond deepens. But is this love story bound by time-do they only have until dawn?

programme.title: Queens of Dope City
programme.desc: Joselyn, Kendra and Alicia are partners in a rideshare service they have created together, but are struggling financially to maintain the business. One day Joselyn gives a man named Donte a ride who presents her with an opportunity to keep the business going. Things then begin to spiral out of control when they soon are chased down from the law, and must escape Donte.

programme.title: Deadly Squatters
programme.desc: Eugene and Laura return home from vacation to find that two young siblings have taken up residence in their home, and have now claimed legal rights as squatters. Forced to share their home with two strangers, they must play their wicked games and survive psychological terror as the legal system takes its time.

programme.title: The Agony and the Ecstasy
programme.desc: When rival gangster Derrick Smith is released from prison, the beef with Armand Rossi explodes into an all-out war in Fountain City, MO. After a hit on his family , Armand goes into killer mode. Derrick and Vic Moore team up for revenge , but Rossi and his partner Qua stay ahead. When they involve Dr. Monica Gaye in the plot , she flips the script to survive. A devastating loss sends a grieving Armand past the point of no return , forcing him to eliminate every one of his opps.

programme.title: Tainted
programme.desc: After growing up in an abusive home from her Mom, Desi continuously runs into problems with men treating her the way her Mom did, until she snaps.

programme.title: Hanging On To Love
programme.desc: Serial dater, Jewel, cannot seem to find love, until she starts to fall for the owner of her dry cleaners.

programme.title: Abraham Lincoln vs Zombies
programme.desc: As the Civil War rages, President Lincoln undertakes a more daunting task: Destroying the Confederate Undead.

programme.title: Hansel and Gretel
programme.desc: In a modern retelling of the classic horror tale, siblings are enslaved in a gruesome house of horrors.

programme.title: Black Panthers of WWII
programme.desc: As WWIl reaches its turning point, the 761st Tank Battalion, a majority-African American unit known as the Black Panthers, must fight to stop Germany's advance during the Battle of the Bulge. The fate of the free world is in their hands.

programme.title: Alien Rubicon
programme.desc: A spacecraft lands in New York and heads toward our Capital. If it arrives, it will trigger an invasion.

programme.title: Planet of the Sharks
programme.desc: In the future, sharks dominate the planet, led by a mutated alpha shark, as human survivors live in terror.

programme.title: Heavy Trip
programme.desc: In this offbeat comedy from Finland, Turo is stuck in a small village where the best thing in his life is being the lead vocalist for the amateur metal band Impaled Rektum. The only problem? He and his bandmates have practiced for over a decade without playing a single gig. The guys get a surprise visitor from Norwaythe promoter for a huge heavy metal music festivaland decide its now or never. They steal a van, a corpse, and even a new drummer in order to make their dreams a reality.

programme.title: The Beyond (Edited Version)
programme.desc: The seven dreaded gateways to hell are concealed in seven cursed places... And on the day the gates of hell are opened, the dead will walk the earth!From legendary Italian horror master Lucio Fulci come the ultimate classic of supernatural terror. A remote and cursed hotel, built over one of the seven gateways, becomes a yawning malevolent abyss that begins devouring both the bodies and the souls of all who enter in a graphic frenzy of gory crucifixions, chunkblowing chain-whippings, eyeball impalements, sulfuric acid meltdowns, flesh-eating tarantulas, throat-shredding demon dogs and ravenous bloodthirsty zombies. THE BEYOND is a towering achievement in hair-raising, mind-bending cinematic terror!

programme.title: Elvira's Movie Macabre: Legacy Of Blood (Edited Version)
programme.desc: Elvira presents this horror thriller where a family is stalked by an unknown killer while attending the reading of a relative's will.

programme.title: Becoming Evil - Serial Killers
programme.desc: 21st-century America is a technological wonder: cell phones, internet, 24 hour news media, DNA breakthroughs, people on the move, and expanding urban centers. But many of the old problems remain: drug addiction, homelessness, prostitution, poverty, gangs, murder, and serial killing. Starting in the 1990s serial killing in America has transitioned and adapted to the changing world, while at the same time in many ways staying the same. What has changed: There is new forensic technology particularly DNA analysis, better cooperation between law-enforcement jurisdictions, increasing awareness and fascination in the media and on the Internet with the serial killer.Most importantly there are new psychological understandings of the serial killer.

programme.title: Terror Train 980)
programme.desc: A nightmare journey to hell begins when a group of college students play a cruel prank on their resident nerd which contributes to sending him insane. Cut to several years later and the same group hold a New Years Eve fancy dress party aboard a privately chartered train, the only problem, they are joined by an uninvited guest.

programme.title: Hell Motel
programme.desc: The guests grow more suspicious when the driver that brought them there days earlier shows up at their doorstep. His presence causes a rift between the men and women, leading to a violent outburst with devastating consequences.

programme.title: Hell Motel
programme.desc: Triggered by a gruesome discovery, one of the surviving guests goes mad, haunted by his own traumatic past.

programme.title: Hell Motel
programme.desc: The surviving guests team up to stop a satanic ritual after discovering the true identities of the killers.

programme.title: Hell Motel
programme.desc: Years later, one guest is thriving, while another is worried the real killer is still at large. Things culminate in a bloody finale at the premiere of a new horror film based on the Cold River Motel massacres.

programme.title: The Marshes
programme.desc: When a group of young microbiologists head deep into the Australian wilderness to test water samples, they inadvertently enter the domain of a mysterious local. As they travel through the marshes, he stalks their every move, determined to kill anyone who enters his land.

programme.title: Ruin Me
programme.desc: Welcome to Slasher Sleepout: The Ultimate Horror Movie Experience combining camping, haunted houses, and an escape room into one extreme 36-hour event. Six strangers are hooded, dropped in the middle of the woods, and must survive a simulated horror movie. Alexandra, the only participant who has never even seen a horror film, reluctantly tags along with her boyfriend. But when the other campers start to die before their eyes, Alex becomes the star of her worst nightmares.

programme.title: Hunter Hunter
programme.desc: A mysterious predator eludes an aging detective and a cunning outdoorsman to corner and terrorize a woman and daughter trapped in a remote forest cabin.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Great Feud" - Granny and the rest of the Clampetts start a feud with the Drysdales since Sonny courted Elly May and then stood her up when granny suggested marriage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly Races Jetherine" - When Sonny Drysdale promises to give Elly May a ring, Granny thinks he's going to propose and becomes a matchmaker. Cousin Pearl can't stand the idea that Elly May will get married before Jethrine, so she sets to matchmaking Jethrine with Jasper Depew.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Pygmalion and Elly" - Sonny Drysdale decides he needs to be Pygmalion to Elly's Galatea and remake her from a hillbilly into a woman of society, while Granny uses love charms to heat up their relationship.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly's First Date" - Mr. Drysdale convinces his self-absorbed stepson Sonny to date Elly May to Mrs. Drysdale's consternation, while Granny and Jed make preparations for Thanksgiving.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jethro Goes to School" - Jed enrolls Jethro at an exclusive Beverly Hills elementary school. Millicent Schuyler-Potts, the proprietor of the school, is aghast when Jed and Jethro show up, convinced this is part of some ghastly hoax. After Jed says that banker Milburn Drysdale is his neighbor, she calls the banker. It turns out that Drysdale's bank holds the mortgage on the school. Schulyer-Potts suddenly warms to the charms of the Clampetts, even if it means accepting Jethro as a fifth grader.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Servants" - Ellie May starts wearing dresses but takes it as an insult when someone says she looks like a city girl. Mr. Drysdale talks Jed into taking in his butler and upstairs girl in a plan to civilize the Clampetts, but they don't quite understand the idea of servants. Miss Hathaway takes Jethro bowling and begins to show an interest in him.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Trick or Treat" - Granny wants to go home because "folks is so unfriendly, no one has come to call." Jed convinces her that they should call on them, and they find that people welcome them and give them all manner of gifts when they show up on Halloween in their normal hillbilly clothes. Also, Jed works on getting Pearl to come visit while she's trying to get hitched to the oilman and find a young man for Jethrine.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Race for Queen" - Elly May competes in a contest to determine "The Queen of Beverly Hills."

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Lafe Lingers On" - Lafe Crick comes back in another scheme to get rich off the Clampetts' wealth.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Girl From Home" - A father and daughter from back home come to Beverly Hills to meet Jed.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Giant Jackrabbit" - Granny encounters a kangaroo, and thinks she's found a giant jackrabbit, but no one will believe her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale's idea for Christmas presents are ones only fit for coastal California, like diving suits and a boat, and a television set, which Granny thinks is some kind of fancy washing machine.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Get Culture" - The Clampetts decide to get a taste of culture to fit in the high-class society of Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly Needs a Maw" - Mr. Drysdale needs investors for his real estate development project, so he enlists the Widow Fenwick, and aims to cement the deal by hitching her to Jed Clampett, who is looking to find a mother for his daughter, Elly May.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Garden Party" - Mrs. Drysdale has a garden party and 'invites' the Clampetts by mistake. They end up back by their 'cement pond' to handle the 'overflow' from Mrs. Drysdale's party. A gun shot by Granny starts the real party.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A janitor-turned-gunfighter's reputation hangs on one lucky shot and a lot of gall. The handyman finds himself in trouble when he accidentally kills another gunfighter.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After being foreman of a jury that convicted an Apache, Lucas is marked for death. Now, he must discover who is behind the curse.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas allows some snowed-in stagecoach passengers to stay with him until the roads are passable. Trouble brews when the whisky salesman and gunfighter fall for the same woman.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Two pranksters write away for a mail-order bride, using Lucas's name.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas recognizes Dr. Battle as an ex-gunslinger with whom he once fought. He helps with a dying man, but Lucas and the doctor have unresolved anger.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While Lucas and Mark are traveling across the Mexican desert they encounter a trio of Mexican bandits who demand payment to cross "their" desert.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark takes a job as a stable boy against his father's wishes.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and Milly are held hostage in her general store when two gunmen attempt a daring robbery.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Two prison wagon drivers stop at the McCain ranch looking for whiskey. Lucas turns them down because they are escorting a murderer, to be hanged in Yuma.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark goes to work for Will Temple, a badly scarred, very mysterious rancher.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas tries to dissuade a latter-day knight from rushing into battle.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Abe Lincoln's claim that he's the Great Emancipator amuses everyone except Matt Yordy.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Stubborn Grandpa Fogarty is Lucas's main roadblock as he tries to get young Woody Fogarty to attend school.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark Twain visits North Fork and quickly alienates the townspeople.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas tries to stop embittered John Holliver from venting his wrath on the people who expelled him from town years before.

programme.title: Go West Young Lady
programme.desc: Penny Singleton and Glenn Ford star in this western musical. Ford plays a marshal who rids a small town of a squirrely outlaw. Singleton and Ann Miller lock horns over the dashing Ford and the ensuing battle is a memorable highlight of the film.

programme.title: The Nevadan
programme.desc: A mysterious stranger crosses paths with an outlaw bank robber and a greedy rancher.

programme.title: Avenging Waters
programme.desc: A ranch hand helps out a family battling a rival rancher over water rights, but finds him trapped when a dam breaks, threatening a flood.

programme.title: Daring Danger
programme.desc: Tim McCoy is nearly killed in a fight with Alexander. He recovers and goes after the bad man, catching up to him and finding that he has taken up with a rustler. Of course, McCoy now has to go after the rustler, too. The film is based on a story by William Colt MacDonald.

programme.title: Cowboy
programme.desc: A tenderfoot Chicago hotel clerk is taken on a cattle-drive to Mexico by famous trail boss Tom Reece.

programme.title: Riders of the Deadline
programme.desc: The 50th of 66 Hopalong Cassidy films finds Hoppy in a vengeful mood. When his good friend Tim Mason is unjustly sent to jail and then killed when trying to escape, Hoppys bitterness gets him drummed out of the Texas Rangers. With the help of his pals California Carson and Jimmy Rogers, he sets out to expose the real culprits and clear Tims name. The usual cast is here, including William Boyd as Hoppy, plus Andy Clyde, Jimmy Rogers, and in one of his earliest roles, Robert Mitchum.

programme.title: The Deadly Companions
programme.desc: An unholy alliance! Marking the feature film debut of one of Hollywoods most influential and widely referenced auteur directors, Sam Peckinpah, The Deadly Companions centers on a redemptive journey to escort a funeral procession through dangerous Indian Territory. Featuring fine work from a top-notch cast that includes the inimitable Maureen OHara at the height of her illustrious career, Peckinpahs first foray into film provides a promising glance into the energetic and violent nature of his iconic later works.

programme.title: The Red Rope
programme.desc: Hired killers and Old West outlaws stand front and center in this riveting tale from Hollywoods Poverty Row. Bob Steele, one of the busiest stars in movie history (everything from the silent era to Republic Pictures to working with Clint Eastwood in Hang Em High) is here as Tom Shaw, the target of a bad mans desperation and hate. Steele appeared in more than 240 movies and television shows, but was never more impressive than in The Red Rope!

programme.title: Red Ryder: Ride, Ryder, Ride!
programme.desc: Red Ryder encounters bandits trying to hold up the stagecoach carrying the owner of the Devil's Hole newspaper, Libby Brooks and her brother Gerry. Red successfully drives off the attackers but becomes embroiled in further conflict, leading to a duel that nearly claims his life.

programme.title: The Gunman from Bodie
programme.desc: The Rough Riders, a popular group that thrilled audiences in the early 1940s, are after a gang of rustlers in this B-western from Hollywood's Poverty Row. Starring Buck Jones, Tim McCoy, and Raymond Hatton, this movie features everything from lawmen going undercover to the Rough Riders looking after an orphaned baby! Also, be on the lookout for the beautiful Christine McIntyre, who would go on to appear in several of the Three Stooges shorts for Colombia Pictures.

programme.title: Springtime in the Sierras
programme.desc: Ads for this Roy Rogers classic roared HEAD FOR THE MUSICAL HILLS...ROY IS GUNNIN' FOR THRILLS! And thrills are what you'll get when you watch this fun, action packed B-Western from Republic Pictures. There's some great comic relief from Andy Devine and Chester Conklin, two of Hollywood's all-time greats. This old-fashioned shoot-'em-up was directed by William Witney, who would go on to direct many of television's top western sagas, including Bonanza, Wagon Train, and The Wild, Wild West.

programme.title: Taken From Rio Bravo
programme.desc: Two friends pursue a group of human traffickers that have kidnapped five women in 1874, East Texas.

programme.title: The Ballad Of Lefty Brown
programme.desc: A merciless cowboy sets out on a dangerous journey across the frontier, determined to do whatever it takes to avenge his longtime partner's brutal murder in this thrilling, action-packed western.

programme.title: The Undefeated
programme.desc: Unaware that the Civil War has ended, Col. John Henry Thomas (John Wayne) successfully attacks a Confederate company led by James Langdon (Rock Hudson). With the remnants of Langdon's squadron fleeing to Mexico, Thomas and his adopted Native American son, Blue Boy (Roman Gabriel), gather a herd of horses and head for the border with their company, to sell them. After Langdon's caravan is captured by a Mexican general (Tony Aguilar), Thomas nobly sacrifices the horses to free them.

programme.title: Jesse James
programme.desc: Jesse James and his brother Frank race to secure the family's buried gold as members of the James-Younger gang attempt to steal it.

programme.desc: After the OK Coral shootout in Tombstone, Doc Holliday opens a small Faro Saloon in a remote town where he encounters Edward Bailey. When a Faro game goes wrong for Edward, he turns up missing and Doc Holliday finds himself on trial for his murder.

programme.desc: Things are going great for Sean and Ellie, Degrassi’s most unlikely couple—so well that Sean asks Ellie to move in. Despite their closeness, Ellie hesitates and Sean doesn’t understand why.

programme.desc: Something’s wrong with Emma. Though she’s frustrated at being treated with kid gloves by everyone since the school shooting, she’s not sure how she’d rather be treated. So she just keeps going on, numbly reassuring everyone that she’s fine so they’ll leave her alone.

programme.title: Stomping Grounds
programme.desc: From country music star Brian Kelley’s big 56’ Sunny Briggs Sportfishing Yacht, to getting caught in a storm aboard a small Hurricane deck boat in the Gulf of Mexico, this episode of Stomping Grounds has host Ryan McVinney exploring boat culture in Florida’s Panhandle region, from the Emerald Coast to The Big Bend and the Forgotten Coast. Brian Kelley, aka “Beach Cowboy”, or BK for short, makes up one half of the country music group Florida Georgia Line (FGL) and has just released his own solo album Sunshine State of Mind. Kelley invites viewers aboard his vessel the “Brittney Marie” which was named after his wife, for a look at the couple’s Stomping Grounds. Songs from his album play on the boat’s sound system - including a tune about shopping for a boat on Boat Trader

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly takes center stage for “Home Week” as he shares a deeply personal dish from his Long Island upbringing: spaghetti with white clam sauce. Drawing on childhood memories of digging for clams in the mudflats of Port Jefferson Station, Clinton walks through a simple yet flavorful recipe using fresh little neck clams, garlic-infused olive oil, white wine, and parsley. As he cooks, the hosts—Carla Hall and Michael Symon—swap stories about growing up, working in restaurants, and stepping outside their comfort zones, with Clinton reflecting on his journey from introversion to becoming a television personality. The episode balances cooking with lively debate, including a spirited discussion about oversized restaurant menus and the etiquette of bringing your own hot sauce to a meal. Michael delivers a passionate rant about seasoning, while Carla offers thoughtful insights on culinary authenticity. The trio’s chemistry shines through playful teasing and shared appreciation for food that tells a story. As the pasta comes together, Clinton emphasizes technique—like gently infusing garlic at low heat and using reserved clam juice for depth of flavor—resulting in a dish that is both accessible and impressive. The episode wraps with the hosts tasting the final product, praising its balance and simplicity. A fun game segment, “Clinton or Clam,” adds humor, followed by fan mail and a giveaway announcement featuring a signed cookbook. The show closes on a warm, communal note, celebrating food, friendship, and the stories behind every dish.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Carla Hall takes center stage during “Home Week” as she introduces Michael Symon and Clinton Kelly to a nostalgic Nashville staple: the hot fish sandwich. Drawing from her childhood memories, Carla explains that unlike the city’s famous hot chicken, this dish is all about being served piping hot straight from the oil rather than spicy. As she prepares cornmeal-crusted catfish, she shares stories of visiting local spots like Ed’s Fish, where the sandwich was a simple, affordable treat enjoyed on Fridays and often eaten outdoors. The hosts dive into a lively conversation about how Nashville has transformed over the years, balancing its old-school charm with its modern “Nash Vegas” energy, while also reflecting on how food traditions connect to community and shared experiences. Carla walks through the cooking process step-by-step, offering practical tips on frying, seasoning, and building the perfect sandwich with white bread, yellow mustard, hot sauce, pickles, and onions. Once assembled, the sandwich sparks an enthusiastic reaction, with the hosts praising its comforting, craveable simplicity. The conversation expands into broader themes about slowing down, engaging with others, and the lost art of waiting for food. The episode continues with fan mail, where the hosts share personal stories about Easter traditions, hidden talents, and the nuances of giving honest feedback. A playful hometown trivia game rounds things out, followed by a humorous and eclectic giveaway from Carla’s own closet. The episode closes on a high note, celebrating the joy of food, memory, and connection

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly, Carla Hall, and Michael Symon reunite in the kitchen for the very first episode of CHEWED UP. Carla makes Sweet Potato Hummus, Michael debates the name, Clinton avoids cooking, and the chaos kicks off immediately.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly, Carla Hall, and Michael Symon dive into a tailgating-themed episode of CHEWED UP with Michael leading the charge. He fries up crispy Pork Schnitzel Sliders while sharing wild football stories, Carla admits she’s barely tailgated in her life, and Clinton once again finds himself assigned kitchen tasks he may or may not be qualified for. Between talk of The Chew’s abrupt cancellation, psychic predictions, and potato roll “squish” debates, the chaos continues.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton ushers in sweater weather with a decadent, over-the-top hot chocolate while the crew revisits the infamous "Eggnog-gate" story - a stomach-turning behind-the-scenes tale from their network TV days. Cozy vibes meet barely appropriate storytelling.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon kicks off the week with Crispy Baked Chicken Wings tossed in a hot honey and lime glaze. The hosts look back on the freeing final weeks of The Chew before its abrupt end, and Michael delivers a passionate rant against air fryers. The trio introduces their new interactive "Fan Fridge" segment, and Clinton shares a hilarious story about how eating messy wings on a date made him realize he was gay!

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Carla Hall brings the heat with a comforting Nashville Hot Chicken Mac and Cheese. Carla builds a heavily spiced, vibrant cheese sauce and folds in crispy chicken and large elbow pasta. The hosts reminisce about Carla's famous ground nut stew from Top Chef, discuss their competitive streaks, and debate the merits of retro candies like Peeps and the 100 Grand bar.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly embraces fall with a recipe for Pumpkin Spice Muffins that double as cupcakes when topped with frosting. While the treats bake, the hosts debate whether muffins belong at breakfast or dessert and share their absolute worst live television disasters including Michael cooking during an active fire and Clinton slicing his finger on live TV.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Carla Hall kicks off Monday with an appetizer: Deviled Eggs Three Ways, including a beautiful beet-soaked variation. Things go hilariously off the rails when Carla accidentally adds too much liquid to her yolk filling, turning it into a soupy mess. The hosts embrace the chaos and try to fix it, while also chatting about the Wicked movie, hating cottage cheese, and giving away a trio of Pop Mustard.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly elevates lunchtime with savory French Onion Soup Tartines, topped with melted Gruyere. While the onions caramelize, the trio discusses their love for French food, debates the perfect early dinner time for getting older, and shares hilarious stories about awkward fan encounters including the time a woman on a crowded train told Clinton he looked "so much fatter in person".

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: It's Friday dessert day, and Michael Symon is baking up a batch of his famous brown butter bittersweet chocolate chip cookies. While the cookies bake, the hosts hilariously debate the size of Michael's head, share the secret to always having warm cookies ready, and Clinton confesses his crush on former NPR host David Greene. The episode wraps up with a Frontgate apron giveaway and plenty of sweet, chaotic banter.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon makes a quick, "uptown trashy" appetizer: Deviled Cheese Toast. While baking the cheesy, pickle-studded baguette slices, the hosts discuss nostalgic white bread, launch their interactive "Fan Fridge" segment, and go on a passionate rant against celebrities who lie about taking weight-loss injections.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: The hosts welcome their first guest, Chef Ayesha Nurdjaja. Michael Symon prepares crispy Beef Kefta, while Ayesha whips up her famous Whipped Feta. Ayesha shares the inspiring story of how she broke into the restaurant industry by sweeping floors, and the group dishes on the intense reality of competing on Bobby Flay's Titans.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Cooking Show
programme.desc: "Week in Review" - Dave and Chris Ying work through some of the weeks failures and successes, and works on refining the approach to the show going forward.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Cooking Show
programme.desc: "Miriam Yoo & Ryan Cooper" - Row neighbor Miriam, propriertor of Flask & Field, Row DTLA's go-to spot for natural wines, craft spirits and general good vibes, stops by to get a meal from Dave.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: On today's episode, Dave talks about the rise of an icon in America: the burger! In the first part of an overarching 25-for-25 series on the rise of fast casual dining, Dave discusses the most influential burger moments in recent history, the celebrity butcher, and how we got to this point—the point in which burger spots rule. He then answers an Ask Dave and cooks up some homemade burgers.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: On this episode, Dave interviews Jack Benchakul, owner and sole barista at Endorffeine Coffee, which celebrates its tenth anniversary this year. The two talk about Jack's path to Endorffeine, as well as coffee culture and history. They also deep-dive into their opposing philosophies on reaching the same goal: finding contentment. For their eating pleasure, Dave prepares three versions of ham and red-eye gravy, a delicious, coffee-based sauce.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: It's time for another Ask Dave Mailbag! Dave starts off talking about his newfound respect for...Italian Sunday dinner (1:52)? Then, he dives into the mailbag. From bad diners (15:48) to pasta serving sizes (28:06) to how to cook a t-bone steak (38:45), Dave answers all. He also announces another Ask Dave prize package winner from those who submit! Submit your Ask Daves and get entered for our next prize drawing in the form below.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: Dave makes a boiled chicken, one of his favorite ways to prepare a delicious meal (2:37). While it boils, he recaps episode 1 of the new season of Netflix's Dinner Time Live with David Chang, the sandwich episode with Joe Manganiello and Joel Kim Booster (7:01). Dave answers an Ask Dave about pop-up restaurants (43:33), and finishes it off by taking his versatile boiled chicken international (48:44).

programme.title: Emeril Tailgates

programme.title: Tasting History with Max Miller
programme.desc: Max explores Alcatraz’s surprisingly good food program (1934–1963) via a Women’s Club cookbook. He covers Warden Johnston’s use of nutrition for order, the mess hall as a riot risk, coveted kitchen jobs, and the 1950 “Spaghetti Riot.” He recreates stuffed pork chops, evaporated milk cucumber salad, and quickie apple pie—better than most U.S. prisons’ meals.

programme.title: Tasting History with Max Miller
programme.desc: Max explores D-Day meals, from pre-invasion steak and lemon meringue pie to the pivotal breakfast of eggs and bacon, K rations, D bars, and British 24-hour assault packs. He covers seasickness, paratroopers trading chocolate for eggs, and 48-hour hunger gaps, featuring stories from USS LCI 94 skipper “Popeye” and soldiers miming chicken for eggs.

programme.title: Tasting History with Max Miller
programme.desc: Max recreates ancient Sumerian beer using the 4,000-year-old *Hymn to Ninkasi*, detailing a week-long process with soaked barley, bappir bread, malting, crushing, and fermentation with aromatics and date syrup. He explores beer varieties, tavern laws, its role in commerce, and mythology like the drunken tale of Enki and Inanna. The nutty, effervescent brew lasts 2–3 days.

programme.title: Tasting History with Max Miller
programme.desc: Step back in time and discover the rich, smoky flavors of bochet, an ancient style of mead once crafted in medieval France. In this episode, we explore the fascinating process behind “black mead,” where honey is slowly caramelized before fermentation, transforming its color, aroma, and taste into something deep, complex, and unlike traditional mead.

programme.title: Tasting History with Max Miller
programme.desc: Max recreates parmesan cheese ice cream from Frederick Nutt’s 1789 *Complete Confectioner*. The episode traces ice cream from Roman snow cones to Persian sharbat, Italian sorbetto, and frozen custards. He covers cream cheese molds (“fromage glacé”), key figures like Procopio and Nancy Johnson, and ice cream’s rise in America via presidents and soda fountains.

programme.title: Serial Griller
programme.desc: In “All the Courses,” Matt Moore celebrates East Nashville’s Tomato Fest with a feast—Breakfast Pizzette, Tuna Nicoise, Scored Flank Steak with Dijon Caper Sauce, and Grilled Watermelon. A multi-course grilling adventure with Southern flair!

programme.title: Chefs A' Field: Green Cuisine
programme.desc: Rising‐star chefs and husband-wife duo Duskie Estes & John Stewart show us why Sonoma’s sheep are prized for their milk, which becomes award‐winning cheese, including that made by master cheese makers Bellwether Farms. In their home kitchen, they prepare a variety of dishes with ingredients from their own backyard garden and the fresh cheeses from Bellwether Farms.

programme.title: Chefs A' Field: Green Cuisine
programme.desc: The mighty Yukon River is the longest river in Alaska and the third longest in North America. Its 2300‐mile stretch of pristine glacier‐fed waters holds the most legendary and mystical salmon in the world‐ the Yukon River King Salmon. In this episode, master seafood chef Rick Moonen ventures to this remote region to meet what he calls, “The best fish I ever ate.”

programme.title: Chefs A' Field: Green Cuisine
programme.desc: Portland, Oregon’s natural bounty is on display at the restaurants of famed chef Vitaly Paley. Chef finds himself in the Cascade foothills in search of the perfect berry. We learn about all varieties of blueberries and even get a chance to mingle with the resident falcon on patrol.Then its into the kitchen to create several dishes where the Northwest blueberry plays starring role.

programme.title: Chefs A' Field: Green Cuisine
programme.desc: When cousins Ryan and Travis Croxton revitalized the long formant family oyster business, they thought it would be a side gig. Today, they lead the nation’s bi-valve resurgence. Chef Jason Alley and his two kids head out on the Bay to harvest the bi‐valves and get a course in marine biology and learn how the oyster is playing a big part in cleaning up the Bay.

programme.title: Chefs A' Field: Green Cuisine
programme.desc: Washington DC Chef Brian McBride, and his daughters visit farmer Mark Toigo to discuss sustainability as they eat their way through rows of perfect peaches and plums. Toigo’s growing methods allows him to produce perfect fruit without chemicals. In the kitchen, the chef and his daughters combine sweet and savory ingredients for a visually pleasing and mouth watering feast.

programme.title: Chefs A' Field: Green Cuisine
programme.desc: Chef Charles Phan is the visionary behind San Francisco’s renowned Slanted Door. Chef and his kids head to the coast where farmer Joe Schirmer is harvesting unique Asian ingredients. The family gathers and sells, together at the Farm Market. Then, back in the kitchen the chef and his kids whip up Vietnamese, Thai, and Chinese specialties with an all American twist.

programme.title: Chefs A' Field: Green Cuisine
programme.desc: In this episode we experience Seattle’s most pure, organic, direct and delicious “Farm to Table” experience with Chef Brian Scheehser. He practices sustainable farming in his own three‐acre garden, with the hand of a farmer and the meticulous nature of a chef. Part Chef‐Part Farmer, Scheehser offers expert tips on cooking and insight on how to grow your garden.

programme.title: Chefs A' Field: Green Cuisine
programme.desc: Chef Alan Wong is happy to be sharing one of the secrets to his success‐farmer Richard Ha of Hamakua Springs Farm. Farmer Ha grows an array of exotic produce. Chef Wong shares another secret as we hit the links, not to golf, but to fish in the golf course ponds! In the kitchen, Wong explains how waves of immigration throughout the generations have influenced his unique take on Hawaiian cuisine.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: An uncooperative woman fights arrest resulting in a trip to the isolation chamber. One inmate calls 911 within jail walls causing confusion. Later, officers run to the rescue when a man passes out.

programme.title: Jail

programme.desc: We follow the men and women of LVMPD as they do their best to tame the New Year's Eve festivities up and down the Las Vegas Strip.

programme.title: The Four Seasons
programme.desc: Sit back and relax as you enjoy the sights and the scenes that bring you the colors and moods of the Four Seasons.

programme.title: Who Took The Cookie? (Finny the Shark) - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Finny’s friends are playing a game of Who Took The Cookie From The Cookie Jar. Who do you think took the cookie? The seahorse, the starfish, the octopus, the walrus, the dolphin, or the crab? Let’s play and find out!

programme.title: Moolissa The Underwater Cow - Finny The Shark and more
programme.desc: Finny’s class finds out they have a new special friend coming for a visit, a cow named Moolisa! Being from land, it can be tricky for Moolisa to do everything that Finny’s friends do in the sea, but Moolisa will try her best to share in all the experiences of life in the ocean.

programme.title: Five Little Monsters Jumping On The Bed - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Here’s a silly and slightly spooky version of the classic kids’ rhyme, Five Little Monkeys, with monsters instead of monkeys. It’s a great song for practicing counting down from five, and for teaching little monsters (and children!) not to jump on the bed.

programme.title: Red Light Green Light - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Tobee learned all about traffic safety in school today! He learned how to walk in a crosswalk, to look both ways before crossing a street, and what the colors of a traffic light mean. That reminds Caitie of a song about stopping and going called “Red Light, Green Light.” Together, they sing and dance, stopping and starting again and again. Tobee and Caitie have a blast, and you can join the fun, too! Green light!

programme.title: Twinkle Twinkle Little Star - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: “Twinkle, twinkle little star. How I wonder what you are?” Lulu the Owl and Juno the Star become fast friends in this Super Simple version of one of the world’s most popular nursery rhymes.

programme.title: Weepy French Onion Soup - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Today, the Bumble Nums are going to make Weepy French Onion Soup. But the four weepy onions they need are VERY tricky to find. Will Humble, Grumble, and Stumble be able to spot all the onions and get back to the kitchen without crying too much? Watch and see!

programme.title: Put On Your Shoes - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Here’s a Super Simple Song all about getting dressed! Sing along as we put on our shoes, jacket, hat, and scarf and then head out for a walk with the family.

programme.title: With My Heart - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Feel the warmth and learn the five senses in this heart warming Super Simple sensory song for kids. It’s also a perfect song to celebrate all parents. I can hear with my ears. I can see with my eyes.

programme.title: 10 Little Dinosaurs - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: 10 Stegosauruses! 10 Triceratopses! 10 Pterodactyls! 10 Brontosauruses! And 10 Tyrannosaurus Rex! Wow! This Super Simple counting song introduces the numbers 1-10 and also some very cool dinosaur names! Can you say them all?!

programme.title: 10 Little Dinosaurs - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: 10 Stegosauruses! 10 Triceratopses! 10 Pterodactyls! 10 Brontosauruses! And 10 Tyrannosaurus Rex! Wow! This Super Simple counting song introduces the numbers 1-10 and also some very cool dinosaur names! Can you say them all?!

programme.title: Flying Dragon Fruit Cake - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Come forth brave warriors and watch the Bumble Nums catch some Flying Dragon Fruits for their fiery Flying Dragon Fruit Cake! But be careful! They breathe fire and are very fast!

programme.title: Hot Cross Buns - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Here’s one of our favorite traditional nursery rhymes about food, made super simple. Come sing along with the Chef from our “Do You Know The Muffin Man?” and “Pat-A-Cake” videos. Yum yum!

programme.title: Carl's Big Adventure - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Carl is visited by three large, very dirty construction vehicles. But Carl’s Car Wash is not big enough to fit them! Carl has an idea! He can supersize his car wash so the vehicles can get a proper scrub-a-dub-dub. He just needs a few parts. With the help of old friends, Carl sets out on a big adventure to the darkest depths of the ocean, the highest heights in the land, and beyond! Don't miss Carl in his first mini-movie as he pushes himself to the limit in the name of vehicular cleanliness!

programme.title: Where Is Baby? - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Peekaboo! Sing along with this adorable song for kids, “Where Is Baby?” Where is baby? Where is baby? Where is baby? There he is.

programme.title: Finny's First Day Of School - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Finny is a bit nervous on the first day of school, but Myrtle the Turtle is even more anxious and literally hides her shell! Surely Myrtle will come out of her shell when their teacher, a whale named Mr. Magellan, has them draw and present their favorite things to the class! Nope. Myrtle is even more nervous than ever! Being a good friend, Finny helps Myrtle through her anxiety, and the tiny turtle finally shows her drawing to everyone.

programme.title: Baby Shark - Finny The Shark and more
programme.desc: Baby Shark, Mama Shark, Papa Shark, Grandma Shark, and Grandpa Shark are out for a family swim and Baby Shark tries and tries to catch the little fishies but his skills aren’t yet up to the task. Just when he thinks he finally has them a (very big) friend of the little fishies steps in to save the day!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: The Super Wings and crew land World Aircraft at World Airport for a day of cleaning their ship. When the Super Pets cause chaos, Storm's sister volunteers to take care of the SPs for the day. Jett delivers a special, hi-tech steering wheel to a girl, Nailah, in Cairo, Egypt. It's for her race quad, Pepper, for an off-road race over the Sahara Desert. Trouble arises when Golden Boy appears.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers a bug shaped safari suit to a boy named Adrian in La Fortuna, Costa Rica! It's a big day as Adrian is going to lead his friends on a bug safari located on his parents' zip line course. Jett and Jett Pet deliver a teddy bear to a girl named Rachel who lost her favorite teddy bear, Ute. With Astra and A.P.'s help, they must then enter Rachel's dream, and find Ute in Dreamland Station.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers a special child minder wrist link to Yeojun, a young Korean boy, so he can look after his younger brother Yeowoon as they follow their dad to a big TV studio on 'take your kids to work day'. Jett and Jett Pet are called to Pilsen, in the Czech Republic to deliver a marionette for the town's Historical Weekend Festival. But Golden Boy ends up getting caught in a giant Golem puppet.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers some special movie making equipment to a boy named Riley who's visiting an alien themed festival in Argentina. Golden Boy winds up telling Riley that he's a real alien. Jett delivers a white dress to a girl named Bhanu in Varanasi, India to wear to a birthday party. But they discover it's the Holi Festival that day. Jett offers to escort Bhanu to help keep her white dress clean.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Jett Pet are called to Dunedin, New Zealand, to help a boy and his new friend collect a trailer's worth of furniture that's rolled down the world's steepest street! Jett delivers a robotic Piggy Bank to a boy, Lorenzo, in Rome, Italy. The bank (Piggy B) can smell coins and put them in its own slot. Trouble occurs when Piggy B tries to collect every coin in the Trevi Fountain.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Jett Pet go to Zhangjiajie, China to help a boy bring a gift to a legendary dragon so he can make a wish. Golden Boy steals the boy's gift for the dragon so he can use it to make his own wish. Jett delivers a wool hat and gloves to a girl, Trisha, in St. John's, Newfoundland, Canada. She's been hoping for snow, but there hasn't been a cloud in the sky for awhile.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Jett Pet deliver special envelopes that can go underwater to a girl named Chay. She lives in Vanuatu and wants to invite all her friends to her birthday party on the beach. Jett brings Jimbo's Mom to World Aircraft for a Mother's Day visit and then sets off to deliver a package of flowers to a girl named Grace in Australia. On the way, he is intercepted by Golden Boy.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A young boy living in Austria named Lukas asks Jett to deliver a wagon that is big enough to carry a large aquarium so he can take his pet catfish with him to the local water park. But the fish is mistaken for a shark! Jett delivers a toy to a boy for his pet hamster - a wheel for it to run in that lights up and plays music. The hamster accidentally runs through a device that makes it huge.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A girl named Selena in Uruguay has lost her first tooth. She's going to put it in a special tooth box that Jett delivers and it's going to go under her pillow for Perez the Mouse. A young boy living in Finland named Petrie asks Jett to deliver a heavy metal wig for his Dad. Petrie wants his dad to perform as a surprise. But the wig flies off and causes a blackout at the concert venue.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett goes to Toronto, Canada to deliver a knapsack to Kamili, but it turns out the bag isn't for him. It's for his cousin Amon in Tanzania. Kamili's internet friends around the world want to contribute too. Jett delivers an incubator to a girl named Nambayar in Mongolia who has found a big egg. The egg hatches into a baby dinosaur! Jett uses a time machine to try and find the baby's mom.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers an incubator to a girl named Nambayar in Mongolia who has found a big egg. The egg hatches into a baby dinosaur! Jett uses a time machine to try and find the baby's mom. While playing at World Aircraft, the Super Pets accidentally damage a new satellite dish. Jett delivers a robot puppy to a little girl named Lien in Singapore. But Lien wanted a real puppy, not a robot.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A young boy named Victor orders a "Travel The World" holographic board game from the Super Wings. When Golden Boy decides to play, and win at any cost. Jett delivers a cardboard playhouse kit to twin sisters, Fatima and Peri in Baku, Azerbaijan. Trouble arises when the competitive sisters try to put all their toys in the playhouse and it rips open.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Jett Pet deliver special farmer's outfit to a girl named Greta who lives in Germany. Greta is very excited to make friends with the animals on her grandfather's farm but the animals escape their enclosure. Jett delivers some mini camper vans to Princess Maribelle in England. Maribelle wants to take her puppies with her on a camping trip. But the group is chased by a bear in the woods.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers a firefighter's suit to a girl named Lydia whose Mom is a firefighter in the Amazon Rainforest. When a real fire emergency happens, the Super Wings and Lydia must upgrade into World Guardian mode to save the rainforest and its animals. Jett flies to Moscow, Russia and delivers a special steamer to a girl named Sasha. She wants to use the steamer to make pelmeni, a Russian dumpling.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A boy named Joy lives in Kenya. Some wild animals from the national park escaped and they are making mayhem in the village! A boy and his Dad in Gwangju Korea need to get a giant watermelon they've grown on their farm in the mountains to a contest in town. Jett delivers a giant slide to help, but the watermelon bounces out of the slide and causes a calamity, knocking over some rare rocks.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: As a tornado bears down on Turkey's Iztuzu Beach, Sevgi wants to bury sand nest for the endangered Loggerhead turtle eggs and save them from the wind. So Jett delivers her a set of digging tools. Jett flies to Sainte-Marguerite Island and delivers an inflatable boat to a boy named Emile. Emile needs the boat to bring a giant robot statue that he made out of lemons to be a float in a parade.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: When Grand Albert loses his camera that has the ability to make things bigger or smaller it's found by a girl in Egypt who is babysitting her baby brother. The camera turns him into a giant baby. A boy, Henri, is given a riding toy truck by his goofball Dad. When it gets dirt, Jett brings a Car Wash Kit to them and together they wash all the dirty cars/trucks in town.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett is excited as he is ready to go on his 300th mission and if he is successful, he will go into the SW Hall of Fame and become a Legendary Super Wing. Jett has to control the fallout from Golden Boy's interference which has lead to the release of a 'dinosaur' from an iceberg in Greenland. The dinosaur takes off with Eric, a local boy that Jett had come to Greenland to help.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Meet fascinating creatures from across the globe and learn to run, hop, and crawl like your favorite animal friends. Dance and sing along to discover animal names and the native habitats of the world's most unique creatures. See real-life images of lions and zebras on the African savannah, then learn animal names through repetition and narration, or simply watch your favorite animals play!

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Meet Cats, Dogs, Birds, Bugs and Woodland Creatures! Learn simple words through narration and repetition. Meet all sorts of creatures from domestic kittens to jungle cats, puppies, big and small birds, butterflies, lady bugs, otters and deer!! See whimsical toys and puppets.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Hop aboard to see vehicles that travel by land, water and sky! See real-life images of cars, boats and planes in this on-the-go adventure that features cameos from some of your favorite Baby Einstein characters, all while listening to music from around the world.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: With the Dolittle, and other Baby programs under their belts, the tots who follow Julie Aigner-Clark's Baby Einstein series will sidle up to Baby Newton expecting a similar exploration of building blocks to brilliance, but this time there's a wrinkle or two. Animation makes its first appearance, and parents steeped in keep-it-simple culture may object to the springy "I Know My Shapes" song, a departure from classical-only video predecessors.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies turn one year old, they continue to develop their communication skills. Meanwhile, with you as their guide, they also begin to explore the world beyond their front door. Baby's Favorite Places presents them with a playful introduction to 20 words for the names of familiar locations from the market, to the library, to the local park.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Discover the wonderful world of water and deep dive into all the amazing creatures that call the ocean home. Learn simple words about the sea like water, coral reef, and ocean through narration and repetition. Engaging live-action footage of your favorite ocean friends and classical melodies will dazzle your little explorer as they experience the magical world under the sea.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Ocean Explorers
programme.desc: Cal, Neptune, Opus, Dean, Tinker and others learn about the flora and fauna of the ocean through STEAM-based principles and real-life footage.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Take your little explorer on an exotic musical expedition to meet wild animals from across the globe. Journey to the jungle, savannah, desert and forest.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Discover the exciting world of shapes and colors! Learn about the primary colors red, yellow, and blue with real-life imagery of animals and objects. Explore colors like purple, orange, and green and see artwork by Van Gogh! Discover the circles, squares, and triangles that surround us in everyday life, and introduce baby to the world of visual arts as children and artists create their own work!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones become increasingly mobile, their fascination with all things that move intensifies too. On the Go: Riding, Sailing and Soaring exposes babies to the different ways people travel -- on land, by sea, and in the air -- while it presents them with captivating real-world images, funny puppet shows, and beautiful classical music by Beethoven, Haydn, Mozart and Rossini.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Baby Lullaby takes your baby on a soothing journey with classical lullabies by Bach, Brahms and Mozart. Enjoy relaxing ocean waves, sweet puppet shows and tranquil images. From fun time to rest time, Baby Lullaby is the perfect way to spend special time with your baby.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Set off on a fun-filled "field trip" with your baby to discover animals found at the park, on the farm, and in your own backyard.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Learn all about music and rhythm in the world around us! Discover classical music and learn instrument names through narration and repetition. Inspire sweet dreams with gentle melodies and a comforting bedtime story. Learn about classical music from Beethoven, Bach, and Mozart. Sing and dance along to classic rhythmic songs like The Wheels on the Bus and see real-life images of instruments.

programme.title: Nursery Rhymes for Children + More Kids Song - Jelly Bears
programme.desc: Join Jelly Bears as they dance to preschool rhymes like Five Little Teddy Bears, Johny Johny and more!

programme.title: Baby Shark & More Nursery Rhymes - Super Supremes
programme.desc: Let's explore the ocean with Baby Shark! Enjoy popular easy to learn nursery rhymes for babies and toddlers. Super supremes is a kids tv show where you can learn more baby songs like swimming song, bath song, five little babies, finger family, twinkle twinkle little star, johny johny yes papa, peek a boo, this is the way, daddy's red car, the muffin man, wheels on the bus and kids songs.

programme.title: Super Supremes Wheels On The Bus & More Popular Kids Song
programme.desc: Do you kids know Wheels on the Bus? Learn this classic nursery rhyme with The Supremes, plus many other fun songs and dances.

programme.title: Booya Non-Stop
programme.desc: Follow the hilarious adventures of five adorable kooky monsters who live under a kid's bed. Living under the bed is easy and kind of safe but these adorable characters are impulsive, curious, and always ready for fun adventures. With a playful dog who is bent on messing up their plans, the group keeps venturing out, finding ways to dodge the snoopy sniffy, creating chaos and laughter around them.

programme.title: Baby Shark + More Baby Songs - Farmees
programme.desc: Let's groove to the Baby Shark Song !! Kids songs and nursery rhymes that the little ones will love. Come join Farmees as they sing along and dance to these kids rhymes like animal sound song, ten in the bed, five little ducks, Incy wincy spider, five little speckled frogs, humpty dumpty, jack and jill, rig a jig jig, miss polly had a dolly, the muffin man, phonics song and many more baby songs.

programme.title: Wash Your Hands & Healthy Habits Song - Super Supremes
programme.desc: Join your favorite nursery rhymes characters, Super Supremes on their fun adventures of learning. Learn to wash your hands and sing along with this healthy habits song and more popular baby songs like Soccer Song, Bath Time Song, Swimming Song, Yes Yes Song, Boo Boo Song, Please and Thank You, Zoo Song, Growing Up Song, Finger Family, Three Little Kittens and many more kids rhymes.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A group of Freedom Fighters is obliterated by a swarm of metallic fly-bots. When Manic goes looking for the insects, he is stung with serum.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A speed enhancing fluid deemed Sonic Tonic is created by Robotnik to make him as fast as Sonic so that he may finally catch him.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: The Hedgehogs congregate on the Floating Island in their latest effort to find their mother. But Sleet and Dingo also have an interest in this island.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: As Sonic begins to chow chili dogs for a snack, he finds a message in the sack from his mother urging him to head to Speedster Island.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Robotnik has his eyes set upon Queen Aleena's crown jewel, but Sonic, Manic and Sonia plan to retrieve the gem before Robotnik.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sonic, Manic and Sonia find an abandoned baby in an alley and begin to look for the baby's parents. Manic becomes very fond of the child.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Robotnik announces that he will marry Queen Aleena in a plot to become the king of Mobius.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: In Part II, Sonic and Sally steal the Roboti-sizer plans, stop the Destroyer from polluting the Great Forest and save Little Sonic, Little Sally and Dulcy's mother, Sabina.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Antoine decides to study martial arts but after he wrecks most of Knothole Sonic sends him off to practice in the woods. //Tails begins his training to become a real Freedom Fighter by learning tracking skills while on a camping trip.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: After Sonic is almost sucked inside the Void, he finds a huge Ring which Sally believes is an ancient relic but it turns out to be trick of the Sorcerer, Nagus. Sally and Bunnie are drawn inside the Void and when Sonic comes to rescue them.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When a blizzard hits Knothole causing Dulcy to demolish a few huts during a landing, Sonic is forced to bunk with Antoine. // During a rainstorm, Rotor is putting the finishing touches on his new female robot assistant, named Ro-Becca.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: On a mission to contact the first Freedom Fighters on the King's List, Sonic and the others are forced to travel through a tunnel which carries a "curse" against all intruders.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Uncle Chuck's "bug" reveals Robotnik's search for the legendary Deep Power Stones, he informs Sally, who tries to retrieve data regarding the Royal Family Secret. But she's denied access via a time-encoded lock-out.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Bob and the gang have got a big job on - repairing some pipework in Farmer Pickles field. / Bob, Scoop & Muck have to make repairs to a tunnel. When they arrive on site, Bob sends Muck ahead into the tunnel with a load of bricks.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic and The Freedom Fighters journey to Robotnik's underground air base in a mission to reprogram the launch data on Robotnik's fleet of Stealth-Bot aircraft. While attempting to reprogram the Stealth-Bot computer system.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling takes Rainbow Ruby to Ellie's cabin where she meets mischievous baby stars that fell from the sky. The baby stars were playing together, got separated from their mother and ended up in Rainbow Village. // Kiki is extremely upset because the jewel Prince Frederick gave her as a gift broke. The friends try to glue the broken pieces together but it doesn't work. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a jewelry designer and tries designing jewelry with the broken pieces.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When Ruby and Choco arrive at the village, they find a very worried looking Ling Ling. Gina, Ellie, and Thunderbell went camping in Rainbow Forest but they saw a monster in the forest, got scared and had to run away. // Ruby is struggling to make a doll with her dad. Ruby and Choco get their suitcase and as Ruby swings her umbrella, there they are, in front of Rainbow fountain. Mayor Ling Ling tells her that today is the day of Princess Kiki's ballet performance.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ruby is looking at shoes that are now too small for her but she is unwilling to throw away. Ling Ling is worried about Thunderbell. His scooter broke so he is not able to carry out his work as a mail carrier. // Gina calls Rainbow Ruby because today is the day to show their appreciation to Mayor Ling Ling. It took a long time for the village friends to prepare an amazing painting for the mayor. Unfortunately, Thunderbell accidentally destroyed the painting while delivering it.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Gina, Thunderbell, and Choco try to cheer Jessy up but their efforts are of no use. While talking to Mayor Ling Ling, Rainbow Ruby realizes that today is the day that Jessy first arrived in Rainbow Village! Jessy was upset that her friends forgot such a meaningful day to her. // Ling Ling has caught a bad cold and was sneezing all over the place. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase and transforms into a doctor and cares for him.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling is worried about the play planned for tonight. There are no costumes ready for the villagers so it's hard to figure out which roles they're playing. Rainbow Ruby transforms into a costume designer and designs costumes for her friends. // It is very windy in Rainbow village and Paige, a paper doll, is flying to wherever the wind takes her. programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling is worried that the villagers are all in low spirits. Ruby thinks of fun games to play but the villagers say that they have already played all of the games too many times. Rainbow Ruby transforms into a singer. // Ling Ling is worried because of the "Secret Present Swapping Party" that Thunderbell is preparing. Thunderbell forgot to send out the invitations. Rainbow Ruby turns into a mail carrier and delivers the invitations.

programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that a Rainbow Ball Tournament is about to start soon but he is worried because the field is covered with pokey pods.
